title: (ENG) 남자는 절대 모르는 남자 꼬시는 여자의 사소한 행동 The 6 cues that men never notice
text: [Professor Cha's Psychology TV] Hello, in today's video we will discuss What women do when they want to seduce men' which is something men are clueless about There are some women who are gorgeous but still can't get a date When it comes to relationships it's not about looks, but skill There's a very interesting thing about people who are good at dating When two people are yet to establish a relationship it is the woman, and not the man, that initates Biologist Timothy Perper concluded from his research that in more than 2/3 of the time women made the first move; this is from 2010 It is women who make men ask them out! Of course there are women who do this with every guy These are women who don't just have one guy but go around flirting and seducing bunch of different men But today I want to talk about the cues women show when they're interested in one person It's so often the case that men don't recognize these cues because they don't know what they are This is unfortunate, so I'll teach you guys what they are The first is when she contacts you frequently Whether it's men or women, if there is interest then you want to contact them and see them and become curious about the other person In this way, you keep messaging more often and calling more often, and furthermore, some women send pictures too Women who are proactive and outgoing will start sending you pictures saying, "I'm at XXX today, isn't it nice?" Then you can consider this as a sign of her expressing interest in you In the case of women and especially very forward women will say things like, "Let's go to the movie, there's one I want to see" "What are you doing this weekend? I'm bored" basically asking you out But clueless men will be like, "I have plans this weekend.." and reject their invitation So in these cases, if she asks you out to the movies don't just let it pass If she invites you to the movies, understand that she is asking you out and choose your words deliberately Something like, "Going to the movies with you feels like a date" or respond to her invitation with "This feels like a date, I'm going to prepare for it like a date" and use the word 'date' deliberately When the woman hears this word 'date' and doesn't respond or

title: (ENG) 남자는 절대 모르는 남자 꼬시는 여자의 사소한 행동 The 6 cues that men never notice
text: to the movies with you feels like a date" or respond to her invitation with "This feels like a date, I'm going to prepare for it like a date" and use the word 'date' deliberately When the woman hears this word 'date' and doesn't respond or laughs it off then she's actually into you But when you mention the word 'date' and she responds with "what the heck? that's so annoying" then you need to let things develop more The second cue is physical contact When women likes a man and when she considers them to be close she will attempt physical contact How does she do that? When she feels quite close, she'll link arms with you but it's not because she always links arms with her friends So when a woman is interested in a man, she'll link arms or grab you by cuffs or the shoulder because when you're wearing high heels it can be dangerous and in Korea the pavement can be quite unstable If the guy is walking ahead, she'll stop him and say, "Why are you leaving me behind.. I'm struggling," and act a little weak She'll grab you by the cuff saying, "Hold on" When someone grabs you by the cuff it's not actual physical contact but it feels like it both for the woman and the man So the woman will grab you by an awkward place like here then the man can naturally hold her by the hand or if he's a gentleman, he'll offer her to grab him here or say 'grab my shoulder' and so on So you can slowly increase physical contact like that Once a woman establishes physical contact with you in this way you can understand this to mean that she feels comfortable with you There are also women who make physical contact in this way with everyone then this is not a sign of them being interested in me But if she's someone who is not very physical in general and only does it with me then it's very likely that she's into you The third cue is when a woman asks for your help She'll ask for help with little things What this means is not that she doesn't actually have anyone around her to help There are plenty of people who can help but she's saying she'd like the person she likes to help her There are several reasons for this One is to make up an excuse to see you And another is to check if you are someone worthwhile by observing how you help her out So she might bring you out to give you something small or say she needs to see you and then chat about unimportant things or make you come help her with things that she doesn't need help on Then men may think, "why did she hit me up

title: (ENG) 남자는 절대 모르는 남자 꼬시는 여자의 사소한 행동 The 6 cues that men never notice
text: her out So she might bring you out to give you something small or say she needs to see you and then chat about unimportant things or make you come help her with things that she doesn't need help on Then men may think, "why did she hit me up for nothing?" But that's not the case She's doing the groundwork to win you over When she asks you for you help on little things then men should be thinking, "she might be interested in me, I need to shoot my shot" and approach her in that way The fourth cue is when she asks you to treat her to a meal She'll say, "Let's have dinner", "Can you buy me coffee?", "Let's go to the movies" The point here is that she wants it to be 'just the two of us' "I'm hungry, can you buy me dinner? I'm nearby" "Can you treat me to coffee? I'll swing by to see you" These are the ways she'll make time for just the two of you When it's just between friends the tone is already quite businesslike But when there is romantic interest, it's more cutesy So when you want to find out if someone's interested in you I often say you should find out based on physical contact But to this topic of physical contact we will come back at the end of the video The fifth cue is when she keeps inviting the guy she likes to her personal groups For instance, she'll introduce you to her friends or introduce you to a private group, or invite you to join her social clubs and thereby tries to establish a personal relationship This is because she needs to be able to meet with you regularly for personal reasons in order for you to develop a relationship This is why a woman will try to establish more private connections with you The sixth cue is when she invites you to "her" space These days there are men who use violence during the break up so a lot of women are scared These days women won't even allow men to walk them home Even if they were to walk them home they'll only allow them to come nearby and not the exact address There are a lot of women who will walk home alone to keep themselves safe these days But sometimes she can be like, '"this is where I live," also show you her place To reveal her address to you means that she trusts you enough to introduce you to her personal space So it can be her office or studio that she invites you to Or she can say "Let's grab some coffee" when you walk her home making up excuses so you don't go making you have coffee near her place Then after a few times having coffee near her place she can go, "I'll just

title: (ENG) 남자는 절대 모르는 남자 꼬시는 여자의 사소한 행동 The 6 cues that men never notice
text: studio that she invites you to Or she can say "Let's grab some coffee" when you walk her home making up excuses so you don't go making you have coffee near her place Then after a few times having coffee near her place she can go, "I'll just make you coffee at my place" and invite you into her home using coffee as an excuse Then men may think "Is she trying to seduce me?" At the same time, they'll worry "Is this going to get me 'Me Too'-ed?..." "I thought she was seducing me" "so I made a move...." "But maybe she'll pull a 'Me Too' on me?" So the point of the sixth cue is when a woman trusts a man, if she not only likes you but trusts you, then this is her saying that she wants to date you It's basically the same It implies that she wants you to ask her out officially But at this point men are super confused about whether they should go or not It's hard, difficult, they're worried about Me Too They'll have a lot crossing their minds So what you do then is the physical contact test When she invites you over to her place unless she is very forward and initates things don't think that you should take things too fast Test the waters by establishing physical contact For instance, while you're having coffee say, "Hee Yeon, you have really fair hands" or "You've had a very long day" as you use one or two fingers to tap her lightly on the hands like this Some people grab a woman's hands suddenly like this but this is not it Even women who are interested in you can find this uncomfortable So try things out with just two fingers If she removes her hand when you place your fingers on her then you guys are not at that stage yet but she wants to get to know you better But if she doesn't remove her hand when you place your fingers then place three fingers, then four and gradually let things develop By the time you hold her hand fully if she doesn't resist then you can think it'll be okay to take things even further But a lot of people will find it overwhelming so don't try to take things all the way, just stop at hand holding and say, "You treated me to coffee today" "Next time I'll take you out" and propose a second date You'll leave an even better impression on her if you leave by saying, "The next time, it will be a date" When women try to seduce men there are some women who directly say "I want to date you" but it's far more common for women to give off signals in a roundabout way which means that she wants you to make the move on her This is

title: (ENG) 남자는 절대 모르는 남자 꼬시는 여자의 사소한 행동 The 6 cues that men never notice
text: ill be a date" When women try to seduce men there are some women who directly say "I want to date you" but it's far more common for women to give off signals in a roundabout way which means that she wants you to make the move on her This is already quite direct and proactive for a woman If you see women like this around you, you can think "Oh, I've been so clueless and haven't picked up on the clues" and practice approaching her slowly I think this would be a good idea I hope this video was helpful, thank you~
